prompt: Build a landing-page hero variant that leads with the morning-brief artifact instead of a feature list. Show a brief card, not a screenshot grid.
summary: Created hero variant A with an animated brief card. 3 files changed. Preview deploy ready.
Dani added notes after the Littlebird trial: 'they stop at remember+answer; our wedge is brief+act. capture is now table stakes.'

prompt: Draft 3 launch one-liner options for the hero. Constraint: lead with proactivity (brief + act), avoid 'capture' and avoid anything Littlebird or Granola could also say. Each must map to a verb we can demo.
summary: Drafted 3 options with rationale: (1) 'Your day, briefed before it starts.' (2) 'Highlight briefs you, then moves your work forward.' (3) 'Stop reassembling your day. Highlight already did.'

prompt: Add a PRD section drafting honest 'known limitations at launch' copy, starting with the Slack Connection reconnect edge case. Tone: calm, transparent, not defensive.
summary: Drafted known-limitations section. Frames the Slack-revoke case as a visible 'reconnect' rather than a failure.
Dani marked option 2 as chosen: 'Highlight briefs you, then moves your work forward.'

prompt: Update the hero variant and PRD to use the chosen one-liner 'Highlight briefs you, then moves your work forward.' Propagate to meta title and OG description.
summary: Updated hero copy, PRD, meta title, and OG description with the final one-liner. Preview deploy ready for Sam.
